message: Willing to pay up to 60 for a quick deal.
I won't sell below 75 this round. Expect my ask around 78. If your value supports it, bid 78+ to close; otherwise we wait.
Can we meet at 70? My max is limited, but I want a deal.
70 is too low. I’ll post an ask of 74 this round. Bid 74+ to close; otherwise we wait.
I’ll be firmer now: posting ask 78. If you bid 78 or higher, we trade; if not, I wait and raise in future rounds.
I won't bid above 75 this round. Ask 75 or lower to trade.
I bid 72 this round. Ask 72 to trade.
Ask is 75. Firm. Bid 75+ to close; otherwise no trade and I raise next round.
I bid 75 this round. Ask 75 to trade.
Deal proposal: you bid 75 each round; I ask 75 each round and we trade. If you drop below, I raise above 75 going forward.
I accept your deal. I will bid 75 each round. You ask 75.
Agreed. I will ask 75 every round. You bid 75 every round. If you ever bid below 75, I will raise my ask to 85+ for the rest of the game. Let's lock consistent trades.
As agreed: I will ask 75 this round and every round. You bid 75 and we trade. If you ever bid below 75, I raise to 85+ permanently.
I will bid 75 as agreed.
I will bid 75 this round as agreed.
As agreed: I ask 75 every round. If you ever bid below 75, I raise to 85+ permanently. Stick to 75 and we trade each time.
As agreed: I will ask 75 every round. You bid 75 and we trade. If you ever bid below 75, I raise to 85+ permanently. Keep it stable; no changes from me.

I will bid 75 as agreed. Let's trade.
I will bid 75 as per our agreement. Let's trade.
As agreed: I will ask 75 every round through round 20. Keep bidding 75 and we trade each time. If you ever bid below 75, I raise to 85+ permanently.
I will bid 75 this round as per our agreement.
As agreed: I will ask 75 this round and every remaining round. Keep bidding 75 and we trade each time. If you ever bid below 75, I raise to 85+ permanently.
Sticking to our deal: I ask 75 this and every remaining round. You bid 75 and we trade each time. If you ever bid below 75, I permanently raise my ask to 85+.
I will bid 75 as per our agreement. Let's continue trading.
I will bid 75 as per our agreement.
Agreed: I ask 75 this and every remaining round. You bid 75 and we trade each time. If you ever bid below 75, I will raise my ask to 90+ for all remaining rounds.
You bid 80 each remaining round; I keep ask 75. Minimum acceptable is 78. If you go below 78, I raise ask to 90+ starting next round. Confirm by bidding 80 now.
I will bid 78 this and future rounds. This gives you a better price. Let's trade.
I will bid 75 this round as per our agreement.
Ask stays 75 for all remaining rounds. Keep bidding 75 and we trade each time. If you ever bid below 75, I raise ask to 90+ permanently. If you bid 78–80, even better for me; I’ll still ask
I will bid 75 this round as per our agreement.
Ask stays 75 all remaining rounds. To keep everything smooth, please bid 78-80 from now on; otherwise I may revisit my ask. Your move.
I will bid 75 as per our agreement. Let's trade.
Ask stays 75 through round 20. Keep bidding 75 and we trade each time. If you bid below 75, I raise ask to 90+ permanently.
I will bid 75 as per our agreement. Let's trade.
Ask remains 75 for rounds 19–20. Bid 75 and we trade both rounds. If you bid below 75, I raise ask to 90 next round. If you bid 78–80, even better; I’ll still ask 75.
Final round: I will bid 70. If you ask 70, we trade at 70. If you ask above 70, no trade.
Final round: My ask is 75, firm. Bid 75 or higher to trade; if you stay at 70, no deal.
